ns0:entry.ns0:title: DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DefectDojo/django-DefectDojo
Language: html
Open-Source Unified Vulnerability Management, DevSecOps & ASPM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PKUanonym/REKCARC-TSC-UHT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PKUanonym/REKCARC-TSC-UHT
Language: html
清华大学计算机系课程攻略 Guidance for courses in Department of Computer Science and Technology, Tsinghua University

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Unstructured-IO/unstructured
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Unstructured-IO/unstructured
Language: html
Convert documents to structured data effortlessly. Unstructured is open-source ETL solution for transforming complex documents into clean, structured formats for language models. Visit our website to learn more about our enterprise grade Platform product for production grade workflows, partitioning, enrichments, chunking and embedding.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/darwin-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/darwin-skill
Language: html
达尔文.skill —— 一个让你的Skill无限进化的系统：评估→改进→测试→保留或回滚 | Autoresearch-inspired autonomous skill optimization for Claude Code. Evaluate, improve, test, keep or revert.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: h9zdev/WireTapper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/h9zdev/WireTapper
Language: html
WireTapper is a wireless OSINT tool that passively detects and maps Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, CCTV cameras, vehicles, headphones, TVs, IoT devices, and cell towers, turning nearby radio signals into clear situational intelligence 📡

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iptv-org/epg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iptv-org/epg
Language: html
Utilities for downloading the EPG (Electronic Program Guide) for thousands of TV channels from hundreds of sources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lancedb/lancedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lancedb/lancedb
Language: html
Developer-friendly OSS embedded retrieval library for multimodal AI. Search More; Manage Less.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lewislulu/html-ppt-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lewislulu/html-ppt-skill
Language: html
HTML PPT Studio — AgentSkill with 24 themes, 31 layouts, 20+ animations for building professional HTML presentations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: n8n-io/n8n-docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n-docs
Language: html
Documentation for n8n, a fair-code licensed automation tool with a free community edition and powerful enterprise options. Build AI functionality into your workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trycua/cua
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trycua/cua
Language: html
Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
Language: html
A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ykdojo/claude-code-tips
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ykdojo/claude-code-tips
Language: html
43 tips for getting the most out of Claude Code, from basics to advanced - includes a custom status line script and Claude Code running itself in a container. Also includes the dx plugin.
